params.name: Medal of Magic Academy
params.description: Hogton School of Witchcraft and Wizardry is well-regarded throughout the magic realm. The students who graduated here are skilled at both light and dark magic and have a high probability of becoming noble magic instructors. So if you spot someone wearing one of these medals, greet them with respect!
